title: Dangal
tmdbOverview: Dangal is an extraordinary true story based on the life of Mahavir Singh and his two daughters, Geeta and Babita Phogat. The film traces the inspirational journey of a father who trains his daughters to become world class wrestlers.
synopsis: Dangal (2016) is a drama, family and comedy film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
